headline: France Faces €1bn Crypto Dispute Over DAC8 Rule

article.title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
article.summary: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

headline: India Crypto Tax Filings Trail 30% of Trades

article.title: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
article.summary: India’s tax department reportedly found that fewer than a quarter of the 645,000 people who made crypto transactions reported them on tax returns.

article.title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
article.summary: A flare-up in geopolitical risks drove stocks and bonds lower as oil jumped after President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, noting the US would probably launch further strikes.

headline: Oil Spikes 5% on Renewed US-Iran Tensions

article.title: Oil Surges After Trump Says US Ceasefire With Iran Is Over
article.summary: Oil jumped after US President Donald Trump said a tentative ceasefire with Iran was over, raising the prospect of a fresh round of conflict in one of the world’s most important energy-producing regions.

headline: Bitcoin Deposits Accelerate 50% Via Lightning Network

article.title: Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark
Polymarket has enabled instant self-custodial Bitcoin deposits via the Lightning Network using Spark.
This post Polymarket Turns On Instant Bitcoin Deposits Via Lightning Network, Powered by Spark

article.title: Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
Kraken is seeking a final Delaware court judgment against former auditor Mazars after winning a $22 million arbitration award, arguing the firm's abrupt resignation during heightened U.S. regulatory pressure

headline: Kraken Recoups $22M in Damages from Auditor

article.title: Kraken Wins $22M From Auditor That Abandoned It During Operation Choke Point 2.0
article.summary: The crypto exchange says an arbitrator sided with it after accounting firm Mazars walked away from a nearly finished audit.

headline: Vanguard Taps Crypto Chief Amid $2T Market Surge

article.title: Morning Minute: Vanguard Hires 'Head of Digital Assets' in Crypto Capitulation
article.summary: Crypto majors fall as the U.S. strikes Iran, ending the ceasefire. Vanguard opens its doors. And a meme coin frenzy erupts on Robinhood chain.

headline: Ripple Invests $1M in Kansas Jayhawks Sponsorship Deal

article.title: Ripple becomes Kansas Jayhawks sports sponsor with XRP patch to appear on jerseys
article.summary: Besides the sports partnership, Ripple has committed to fund financial and technology education programs for student-athletes.

headline: 3,588 BTC Sold: Bitcoin Futures At Risk

article.title: Strategy’s 3,588 BTC sale puts future bitcoin selling in focus: analysts
article.summary: Strategy sold 3,588 BTC last week, with CF Benchmarks suggesting continued sales would become a concern if they stop being a choice.

headline: Oil Surges 5% on Renewed Iran Tensions

article.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is ‘over’ and warns of further strikes
article.summary: Oil price rises 5 per cent after US president says that negotiating with Tehran is a ‘waste of time’

headline: Oil prices surge 5% on Iran unrest fears

article.title: Iran projects regional power as Khamenei funeral heads to Iraq
article.summary: Slain supreme leader’s body will be on display in Shia holy cities as Tehran seeks to revive axis of influence
